title: No || 0 or || 0n anti-patterns in changed production files
evidence: Scanned 14 changed .ts production files: coordinator.ts, validation.ts, worker-manager.ts, algebra-parser.ts, balancer-v2-parser.ts, curve-parser.ts, solidly-parser.ts, trader-joe-parser.ts, v2-pair-parser.ts, v3-pool-parser.ts, multi-leg-path-finder.ts, client.ts, streams.ts, rate-limiter.ts. Zero occurrences of || 0 or || 0n found.
actual: Clean — all changed files use ?? (nullish coalescing) correctly.

title: HMAC signing: STREAM_SIGNING_KEY documented and enforced in production
evidence: streams.ts:459-464 throws in production if signingKey missing. .env.example:621 documents STREAM_SIGNING_KEY. Empty/whitespace detection at streams.ts:1651-1660. Fail-closed enforced.
expected: HMAC signing enforced in production with fail-closed behavior
actual: Correctly implemented. Production throws if STREAM_SIGNING_KEY missing, empty/whitespace detected and warned.

title: HMAC key rotation: STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS documented and wired
evidence: STREAM_SIGNING_KEY_PREVIOUS documented at .env.example:622-625. Code at streams.ts:1664 and 1734 reads previous key. Both getRedisStreamsClient() and createRedisStreamsClient() wire it. LEGACY_HMAC_COMPAT at .env.example:629 matches code var name at streams.ts:1674.
expected: Key rotation with previous key acceptance during rotation window
actual: Correctly implemented in both factory functions with documentation.

title: LEGACY_HMAC_COMPAT .env.example comment says default=true but code default is false
evidence: .env.example:626 says '(default: true)'. Code at streams.ts:1674 uses === 'true' (opt-in, default false). Comment at streams.ts:1671-1673 confirms: 'P1 Fix: Flip default to OFF (explicit opt-in)'.
expected: .env.example comment should reflect actual code default
actual: Comment says default is true but code default is false since P1 fix flipped it to opt-in.
recommendation: Update .env.example:626 from '(default: true)' to '(default: false)' to match code.

title: All 23 feature flags documented in .env.example
evidence: 23 FEATURE_* flags in feature-flags.ts FEATURE_FLAGS object all have corresponding entries in .env.example: BATCHED_QUOTER, FLASH_LOAN_AGGREGATOR, COMMIT_REVEAL, COMMIT_REVEAL_REDIS, DEST_CHAIN_FLASH_LOAN, MOMENTUM_TRACKING, ML_SIGNAL_SCORING, SIGNAL_CACHE_READ, LIQUIDITY_DEPTH_SIZING, DYNAMIC_L1_FEES, ORDERFLOW_PIPELINE, KMS_SIGNING, FAST_LANE, BACKRUN_STRATEGY, UNISWAPX_FILLER, MEV_SHARE_BACKRUN, SOLANA_EXECUTION, STATISTICAL_ARB, MEV_SHARE, ADAPTIVE_RISK_SCORING, TIMEBOOST, FLASHBOTS_PROTECT_L2, COW_BACKRUN.
actual: 23/23 flags present in both code and .env.example.

title: Feature flag opt-in/opt-out patterns correct
evidence: 22 flags use === 'true' (opt-in): all experimental features. 1 flag uses !== 'false' (opt-out): useDynamicL1Fees. Opt-out pattern is correct for safety-critical L1 fee estimation (disabling causes 2-10x gas underestimation on L2s).
expected: Experimental flags opt-in, safety-critical flags opt-out
actual: Pattern assignment is correct for all 23 flags.

title: Feature flag cross-dependencies validated at startup
evidence: feature-flags.ts validates: SIGNAL_CACHE_READ requires ML_SIGNAL_SCORING (line 653), ML_SIGNAL_SCORING benefits from MOMENTUM_TRACKING (line 664), COMMIT_REVEAL_REDIS requires REDIS_URL (line 573, throws in prod), SOLANA_EXECUTION requires SOLANA_RPC_URL (line 747, throws in prod), MEV_SHARE_BACKRUN requires MEV_SHARE (line 775).
actual: All critical cross-dependencies have validation with appropriate severity levels.

title: All risk env vars documented with cross-validation
evidence: RISK_TOTAL_CAPITAL, RISK_KELLY_MULTIPLIER, RISK_MAX_SINGLE_TRADE, RISK_MIN_EV_THRESHOLD, RISK_MIN_WIN_PROBABILITY, RISK_MAX_LOSS_PER_TRADE all documented in .env.example. RISK_TOTAL_CAPITAL required in production (risk-config.ts:271). Cross-validation defaultWinProbability >= minWinProbability at risk-config.ts:329-335.
expected: Risk vars documented, RISK_TOTAL_CAPITAL required in production, cross-validation present
actual: All requirements met. Default values satisfy cross-validation constraints (0.5 >= 0.3).

title: No raw parseInt/parseFloat(process.env) in changed files
evidence: Scanned 14 changed .ts production files for parseInt(process.env and parseFloat(process.env patterns. Zero occurrences found. All env var parsing in changed files uses safe helpers (parseEnvIntSafe, parseEnvFloatSafe, safeParseInt, safeParseFloat, safeParseFloatBounded, safeParseIntBounded).
expected: No raw parseInt/parseFloat on process.env without NaN guards
actual: Clean — all changed files use safe parsing utilities.

title: Redis client.ts and streams.ts connection parameters in full parity
evidence: Both files changed in this session. Compared: retryStrategy (identical capped exp backoff 200*2^n, cap 60s), connectTimeout (both 3000ms), maxRetriesPerRequest (both 3), lazyConnect (both true), enableReadyCheck (both false), retryDelayOnFailover (both 100), reconnectOnError (both check READONLY). Full parity across all 7 connection parameters.
expected: Redis connection parameters should be aligned between client.ts and streams.ts
actual: All 7 parameters are identical. Previous SA-1K-001/SA-1K-002 fixes for enableReadyCheck and retryDelayOnFailover alignment are in place.
recommendation: No action needed. Full parity maintained.
